ops.text:
STAGE 1/3 RESULT — early_return (shape-change flagged, not a normal completion).

Validated the prior lane's output (2018 rows, /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E24/out/decisions.jsonl):
- Dedup: 2018/2018 unique on (session_id, tool_use_id, question_index); 0 duplicate keys.
- Field coverage: 0/2018 rows missing/broken required fields across the FULL file (not just the 15-row spot check, which also passed clean) — all 14 fields present, options length == option_count, picks non-empty (incl. Other/custom text as its own class with option_index=null), context_digest<=2000 chars, session_id/repo/timestamp populated.
- Stats written to /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E24/out/decisions.stats.json: unique_sessions=464, unique_repos=58, option_count_distribution={2:749,3:1060,4:209}, multi_select_share=0.0595, pick_position_distribution={0:1041,1:362,2:132,3:18,custom:490}, distinct_headers=1496 (top: Scope=103, Fix scope=29, Next step=18).

BLOCKING FINDING: counts_by_root = {"mirror": 2018} only — zero rows from any pool account. Root-caused, not a script bug: readlink -f on all 18 /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-*/projects (incl. the acct-11/17/18 CloudStorage-symlinked ones) shows every single one resolves to the IDENTICAL /Users/yasyf/.claude/projects. cc-transcript's --root flag (confirmed via `tools --help`: "Projects directory to search [default: ~/.claude/projects]") does a plain directory walk, no per-account filtering/scoping exists in the tool. So "sweep every pool account root" as literally specified in this task is indistinguishable from sweeping local ~/.claude/projects 18x over — which conflicts with (a) this task's own inline caveat "NEVER local ~/.claude" attached to the mirror-sweep instruction, and (b) the standing cross-session memory decision analyze-mirror-corpus-not-local-claude ("never the local ~/.claude/projects"). The task's assumption that pool-account roots hold data distinct from local ~/.claude does not hold on this host. Did not decide unilaterally; returned early per the check-back rule with 4 options for the orchestrator.

No script fix/re-extract performed pending that decision. No LLM calls, no repo mutations, no writes outside ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E24/{scripts,out}.
